game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Spaceholes - Arcade Watch Game**: This arcade shooter places players in control of a spaceship positioned at the center of a circular "spacehole" tunnel, defending against waves of alien bugs. Players rotate their ship around the central axis by swiping left or right on the screen, while the ship automatically fires projectiles at a fixed rate towards incoming enemies. Enemies spawn from the outer edges of the tunnel and move inwards, with difficulty scaling as their spawn rate increases every 15 seconds, and new, faster enemy types appear after every 5 waves. The objective is to survive as long as possible and achieve the highest score, which is earned by destroying enemies, with the game ending immediately if the player's ship collides with an enemy or is hit by an enemy projectile.
game_info.description: Defend your position in the center of a circular spacehole tunnel against waves of alien bugs! Your spaceship automatically fires at enemies approaching from the outer edges. Survive increasingly difficult waves as enemies spawn faster and new enemy types appear. Rack up points by destroying enemies, but beware - one collision ends your mission. How long can you survive in the depths of space?
game_info.controls:
Left Arrow: Rotate ship counter-clockwise around the tunnel
Right Arrow: Rotate ship clockwise around the tunnel
ENTER: Start the game
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to start screen

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and shooting validation. This test verifies that the player can rotate around the tunnel and that projectiles are being fired correctly. It also checks that enemies spawn and move toward the center.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Continuously rotate the ship in both directions while monitoring projectile creation and enemy spawning. Track position changes to ensure movement is working correctly. Verify that projectiles are created at regular intervals.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player position should change smoothly as rotation inputs are provided. Projectiles should spawn at regular intervals from the player's position. Enemies should spawn from the outer edges and move inward. Test runs for a fixed duration to validate basic mechanics.

TEST_2.test_description: Optimal survival strategy to achieve a win condition by surviving for an extended period and destroying many enemies. This tests the full game loop including collision detection, scoring, and difficulty progression.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Implement an intelligent targeting system that rotates the ship to face the nearest approaching enemy. Maintain optimal positioning by constantly adjusting angle to maximize hit probability. Prioritize enemies that are closest to the center to prevent collisions.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The test should survive multiple waves, accumulate a high score by destroying enemies, and demonstrate the game's difficulty progression. Success is achieved by surviving for at least 60 seconds or reaching a score threshold, validating that the game is winnable with skilled play.
